$description: Weave 3 Design Tokens — W3C Community Group Format. Three color schemes (light-gray, dark-gray, dark-blue) × three densities (medium, high, low). Primitive color palette included as generic/color.

$metadata.source: Autodesk Weave 3 design system — extracted from Figma

generic.$description: Primitive color palette — raw Weave 3 color ramp values

semantic.$description: Semantic tokens — color-scheme-specific surface, text, border, and feedback colors. Three modes: light-gray (default light), dark-gray, dark-blue.

density.$description: Density-specific tokens — spacing, sizing, border-radius, font-size, and line-height values. Three modes: medium (default), high (compact), low (spacious).

typography.$description: Typography tokens — font families, weights, and fixed scales shared across all color schemes and densities.
